input.command:
cd /workspace/dashboard && cp package.json package.json.backup && cat > package.json << 'EOF'
{
  "name": "dashboard",
  "version": "2.0.0",
  "description": "Admin dashboard frontend",
  "main": "src/index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "react-scripts start",
    "build": "react-scripts build",
    "test": "react-scripts test"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "react": "^19.2.4",
    "react-dom": "^19.2.4",
    "react-router-dom": "^7.14.0",
    "axios": "^1.14.0",
    "chart.js": "^4.5.1",
    "react-chartjs-2": "^5.3.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "react-scripts": "^5.0.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^14.1.0",
    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.1.4"
  }
}
EOF
echo "✓ package.json updated"
